name: kora
description: Kora Framework — fastest JVM framework with compile-time DI. Zero reflection, zero proxies, zero runtime magic. Simple & easy: HTTP/REST, JDBC/Redis/Kafka, OpenAPI, validation, caching, resilience, scheduling, observability.
